summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Iteration 56 - Major UI redesign of Trajectoire tab. All 10 features tested and verified working correctly. The redesign includes: dark gradient hero header with stats, two-column layout, viewer visibility cards with switches, enriched timeline cards with type badges/competences/acquis/visibility selectors, AI insights sidebar with narrative and dominant skills, coherence scores with 5 progress bars, share options (3 versions), trust card, and proper empty state for users without steps.
critical_code_review_comments: Dark gradient hero header (trajectory-hero) correctly shows only when steps.length > 0
Viewer cards (viewer-card-self, viewer-card-conseiller, viewer-card-recruteur) with switches working
Timeline steps (timeline-step-*) show type badge, competences, acquis, visibility selector
AI synthesis auto-loads when steps exist (synthesis-insights, synthesis-scores)
5 coherence scores displayed: Cohérence, Adaptabilité, Transférabilité, Continuité, Alignement métier
Share options section shows 3 versions: accompagnement, recrutement, publique
Trust card (trust-card) shows 'Votre parcours vous appartient' message
Empty state (cv-entry-section) correctly shows upload prompt when no steps exist
framer-motion animations working for entrance effects
seed_data_creation: Used existing bob23 user with 5 trajectory steps and testboost user with 0 steps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 Trajectoire tab redesign fully tested. All features working: 1) Dark gradient hero header with 'Ma trajectoire professionnelle' title, 'Profil personnalité et compétences' badge, stats card (Cohérence 70/100, 5 étapes), 'Charger mon CV' and 'Partager une version adaptée' buttons. 2) Two-column layout with left column (viewers + timeline) and right column (AI insights). 3) Viewer cards with Frise/Accès tabs, 3 cards (Moi uniquement/Conseiller/Recruteurs) with switches. 4) Timeline with enriched cards showing type badge, competences badges, acquis, visibility selector. 5) AI insights showing narrative + dominant skills badges. 6) Coherence scores with 5 progress bars. 7) Share options (3 versions). 8) Trust card. 9) Empty state for testboost. 10) All 4 tabs navigable.

details: Stats card with 'Cohérence de parcours 70/100' and 'Étapes enregistrées 5'
Left column wider than right column
3 viewer cards: Moi uniquement (Actif), Conseiller (Désactivé), Recruteurs (Désactivé)
Switches working on Conseiller and Recruteurs cards
Competences badges (Comptabilité, Droit bancaire, Économie) found
'Ce que mon parcours révèle' title found
'Compétences les plus visibles' badges: Adaptation, Organisation, Communication
3 options: Version accompagnement, Version recrutement, Version publique
Explanatory message about RE'ACTIF PRO data control
Hero header NOT shown (correct for empty state)
CV entry section with upload icon found
'Commencez par charger votre CV' message found
No timeline steps shown (correct for 0 steps)
Trajectoire tab navigable and active by default
Compétences tab navigable with CV section visible
Documents tab navigable with coffre-fort content
Matching tab navigable with job matching content
